# Terraform GCP MySQL Management Module

 [![Latest Release](https://img.shields.io/github/release/cloudopsworks/terraform-module-gcp-mysql-management.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cloudopsworks/terraform-module-gcp-mysql-management/releases/latest) [![Last Updated](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/cloudopsworks/terraform-module-gcp-mysql-management.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cloudopsworks/terraform-module-gcp-mysql-management/commits)


Terraform module for managing MySQL users, databases, and privileges on Google Cloud SQL (Cloud SQL for MySQL).
Credentials for created users are stored in GCP Secret Manager. Supports direct MySQL connections,
Cloud SQL instance lookup, and credential retrieval from an existing Secret Manager secret.
Enterprise Hoop integration is available for database access management.


---

This project is part of our comprehensive approach towards DevOps Acceleration.

It's 100% Open Source and licensed under the [APACHE2](LICENSE).







We have [*lots of terraform modules*][terraform_modules] that are Open Source and we are trying to get them well-maintained!. Check them out!






## Introduction

This module provisions MySQL databases and users on a Cloud SQL MySQL instance (or any reachable MySQL endpoint)
and stores their credentials as JSON secrets in GCP Secret Manager. It supports three connection modes:

1. **Cloud SQL** — looks up the instance IP via the `google_sql_database_instance` data source.
2. **Cloud SQL from Secret** — reads admin credentials from an existing Secret Manager secret.
3. **Direct** — connects directly using host/port/username/password supplied as variables.

Hoop enterprise connections are provisioned as individual Secret Manager secrets per user and
exposed via the `hoop_connections` output for downstream consumption by a Hoop management module.

## Usage


**IMPORTANT:** The `master` branch is used in `source` just as an example. In your code, do not pin to `master` because there may be breaking changes between releases.
Instead pin to the release tag (e.g. `?ref=vX.Y.Z`) of one of our [latest releases](https://github.com/cloudopsworks/terraform-module-gcp-mysql-management/releases).


```hcl
# terragrunt.hcl

terraform {
  source = "git::https://github.com/cloudopsworks/terraform-module-gcp-mysql-management.git//?ref=v1.0.0"
}

inputs = {
  # --- Cloud SQL connection (pick one mode) ---
  cloudsql = {
    enabled        = true          # (Optional) Enable Cloud SQL mode. Default: false.
    instance_name  = "my-cloudsql" # (Required when enabled) Cloud SQL instance name.
    project_id     = ""            # (Optional) GCP project; defaults to current project.
    from_secret    = false         # (Optional) Read admin creds from Secret Manager. Default: false.
    secret_id      = ""            # (Required when from_secret=true) Secret Manager secret ID.
    server_name    = ""            # (Optional) Friendly server name used in secret paths.
    admin_username = "root"        # (Optional) Admin username. Default: root.
    admin_password = ""            # (Optional) Admin password.
    db_name        = "mysql"       # (Optional) Admin database. Default: mysql.
  }

  # --- Direct connection (alternative to cloudsql) ---
  direct = {
    server_name = ""    # (Optional) Friendly server name used in secret paths.
    host        = ""    # (Required) MySQL host.
    port        = 3306  # (Optional) MySQL port. Default: 3306.
    username    = ""    # (Required) Admin username.
    password    = ""    # (Required) Admin password.
    db_name     = "mysql" # (Optional) Admin database. Default: mysql.
  }

  # --- Databases ---
  databases = {
    mydb = {
      name                  = "mydb"              # (Required) Database name.
      create_owner          = true                # (Optional) Create owner user. Default: false.
      owner                 = "mydb_owner"        # (Optional) Owner username. Default: <name>_owner.
      default_character_set = "utf8mb4"           # (Optional) Default: utf8mb4.
      default_collation     = "utf8mb4_unicode_ci" # (Optional) Default: utf8mb4_unicode_ci.
      host                  = "%"                 # (Optional) Host for owner. Default: %.
      tls_option            = "NONE"              # (Optional) NONE, SSL, X509. Default: NONE.
    }
  }

  # --- Users ---
  users = {
    app_user = {
      name          = "app_user"  # (Required) MySQL username.
      grant         = "readwrite" # (Required) owner | readwrite | readonly.
      db_ref        = "mydb"      # (Optional) Reference to databases key.
      database_name = ""          # (Optional) Database name when db_ref not set.
      host          = "%"         # (Optional) Default: %.
      tls_option    = "NONE"      # (Optional) NONE, SSL, X509. Default: NONE.
      import        = false       # (Optional) Import existing user. Default: false.
    }
  }

  # --- Roles ---
  roles = {
    reporting = {
      name          = "reporting"         # (Optional) Role name; defaults to map key.
      db_ref        = "mydb"              # (Optional) Reference to databases key.
      database_name = ""                  # (Optional) Database name when db_ref not set.
      table_name    = "*"                 # (Optional) Default: *.
      grant_option  = false               # (Optional) Default: false.
      grants        = ["SELECT", "SHOW VIEW"] # (Optional) Default: ALL PRIVILEGES.
    }
  }

  # --- Hoop (enterprise only) ---
  hoop = {
    enabled        = false  # (Optional) Enable Hoop integration. Default: false.
    agent_id       = ""     # (Required when enterprise) Hoop agent ID.
    community      = true   # (Optional) true = community (no secrets); false = enterprise. Default: true.
    import         = false  # (Optional) Import existing Hoop connection. Default: false.
    tags           = {}     # (Optional) Tags to attach to Hoop connections.
    access_control = []     # (Optional) Access control list.
  }

  # --- Misc ---
  password_rotation_period = 90    # (Optional) Rotation period in days. Default: 90.
  force_reset              = false # (Optional) Force password reset. Default: false.
  secrets_kms_key_name     = null  # (Optional) GCP KMS key for secret encryption.
}
```

## Quick Start

1. Initialise the provider: `make init/gcp`
2. Configure `cloudsql` or `direct` in your `inputs.yaml` / Terragrunt inputs.
3. Add `databases` and `users` entries.
4. Run `terragrunt apply`.


## Examples

See the `usage` section above for a full Terragrunt example.

## Inputs

| Name | Description | Type | Default | Required |
|------|-------------|------|---------|:--------:|
| <a name="input_cloudsql"></a> [cloudsql](#input\_cloudsql) | Cloud SQL MySQL instance connection — see inline docs. | `any` | `{}` | no |
| <a name="input_databases"></a> [databases](#input\_databases) | Map of MySQL databases — see inline docs. | `any` | `{}` | no |
| <a name="input_direct"></a> [direct](#input\_direct) | Direct MySQL connection — see inline docs. | `any` | `{}` | no |
| <a name="input_extra_tags"></a> [extra\_tags](#input\_extra\_tags) | Extra tags to add to the resources | `map(string)` | `{}` | no |
| <a name="input_force_reset"></a> [force\_reset](#input\_force\_reset) | (Optional) Force reset all passwords. Default: false. | `bool` | `false` | no |
| <a name="input_hoop"></a> [hoop](#input\_hoop) | Hoop connection settings — see inline docs. | `any` | `{}` | no |
| <a name="input_is_hub"></a> [is\_hub](#input\_is\_hub) | Is this a hub or spoke configuration? | `bool` | `false` | no |
| <a name="input_org"></a> [org](#input\_org) | Organization details | <pre>object({<br/>    organization_name = string<br/>    organization_unit = string<br/>    environment_type  = string<br/>    environment_name  = string<br/>  })</pre> | n/a | yes |
| <a name="input_password_rotation_period"></a> [password\_rotation\_period](#input\_password\_rotation\_period) | (Optional) Password rotation period in days. Default: 90. | `number` | `90` | no |
| <a name="input_roles"></a> [roles](#input\_roles) | Map of MySQL roles/privilege sets — see inline docs. | `any` | `{}` | no |
| <a name="input_secrets_kms_key_name"></a> [secrets\_kms\_key\_name](#input\_secrets\_kms\_key\_name) | (Optional) GCP KMS key name for encrypting secrets. | `string` | `null` | no |
| <a name="input_spoke_def"></a> [spoke\_def](#input\_spoke\_def) | Spoke ID Number, must be a 3 digit number | `string` | `"001"` | no |
| <a name="input_users"></a> [users](#input\_users) | Map of MySQL users — see inline docs. | `any` | `{}` | no |

## Outputs

| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
| <a name="output_databases"></a> [databases](#output\_databases) | Map of created MySQL databases. |
| <a name="output_hoop_connections"></a> [hoop\_connections](#output\_hoop\_connections) | Hoop connection definitions (enterprise only; community returns null). |
| <a name="output_users"></a> [users](#output\_users) | Map of created MySQL users with their GCP Secret Manager secret IDs. |
